title: LIFE SKILLS AND ONE-ON-ONE MENTORING - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY LIFE SKILLS AND ONE-ON-ONE MENTORING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Classroom and mentoring program teaching budgeting, life skills, job preparation, parenting skills, and Bible study. Resource incentives may be provided for those successfully participating in the program.
